scientific_justification.what_is_being_claimed: The observed I–V characteristic may be interpreted as Fowler–Nordheim tunneling if low-field current suppression and abrupt turn-on behavior in the intermediate-field regime dominate the observed coordinate space.

mechanism_proposals.interpretation_note: Fowler–Nordheim tunneling is conditionally proposed when low-field current suppression and abrupt intermediate-field turn-on behavior dominate the observed coordinate space.

scientific_justification.important_note: This justification proposes Fowler–Nordheim tunneling only if the specified coordinate conditions are satisfied. No mechanism is asserted outside this domain.
